text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is studying the lineup for this year's
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the runners featured in her magazine
are other students from the academy. She's seen
them training before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She knows them already, so why bother studying?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But on the day of, they all seem completely
different to Tosen Jordan. They have an aura
about them she's never seen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intimidated, her legs start trembling. The clash of
racing giants that is the Arima Kinen begins.
